deadlines.title: Entra Hard-Match Restriction
deadlines.action: Audit role-holding cloud accounts and validate sync rules before this silently breaks provisioning pipelines.

deadlines.title: Work IQ Researcher Agent Preview
deadlines.action: Enroll dev teams in preview to test agentic workflow integrations ahead of July GA.

deadlines.title: CA Resource Exclusion Enforcement
deadlines.action: Test apps with 'All resources' CA exclusions before enforcement. Run CA What-If in non-prod.
deadlines.applies_to: All tenants with Conditional Access policies

deadlines.title: Secure Boot 2023 Certificates
deadlines.action: Check Secure Score. Deploy May 2026 CU across fleet before cert expiry.
deadlines.applies_to: Windows device fleets (Intune or SCCM managed)

deadlines.title: Entra Connect → Cloud Sync Migration
deadlines.action: Begin readiness assessment now, especially if you have write-back scenarios or custom sync rules.
deadlines.applies_to: Hybrid identity orgs running Entra Connect

deadlines.title: Purview Lifecycle Archiving GA
deadlines.action: Scope retention policies for OneDrive/SharePoint now to maximize benefit at GA.
deadlines.applies_to: Orgs with Purview E3 or E5 licensing

deadlines.title: Purview Lifecycle Insights GA
deadlines.action: Plan review of Purview recommendations; align with DLP and labeling strategy.
deadlines.applies_to: Orgs with Purview E3 or E5 licensing

deadlines.title: Work IQ Researcher Agent GA
deadlines.action: Have agentic workflow integrations tested from the June preview window.

deadlines.title: Ubuntu 22.04 LTS EOS (Intune)
deadlines.action: Identify 22.04 devices in Intune and start upgrade comms. New enrollments blocked after EOS.
